'''Ymura''' was one of two [[Planet/Legends|planets]] in the [[Karlatt]] system terraformed by the [[Machinist Theocracy]] that served as home to ultra-wealthy [[Morse (Karlatt)|Morses]]. It was in the [[Karlatt system]] of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Galactic Core]].

{{Planet-stub}}

==Appearances==
*{{BackstabCite|30|La Révolte d'Acier: Épisode 3 - À la recherche du Temple Maudit}} {{1st}}
